text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, while returning a book to the<n>library...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
...And what... um... what should we do<n>about this
year's Reading Week<n>event?

text_block_list.name: Library Assistant A
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. I think we'll be fine just<n>displaying some
extra issues of the<n>library newspaper like we do
every<n>year.

text_block_list.name: Library Assistant B
text_block_list.text:
I know how you feel, Zenno, but<n>hardly anyone's
ever interested...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
B-b-but I really think this could be a<n>great
opportunity for people to connect<n>with books...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I couldn't convince them.
choice_data_list: Reading Week prep sure sounds tough...
Reading Week prep sure sounds tough...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Hm? Ah, um...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
From what she tells me, it sounds like<n>the library
staff aren't very enthused<n>about the Reading
Week promotional<n>event.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Students tend to avoid reading<n>because they
think it's difficult, and<n>the library staff feel like
it's pointless<n>to make an effort.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
But if people give up on reading<n>without giving it
a try, they're really<n>going to miss out... The
thought of it<n>makes me sad.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Fairy tales, adventures, epic sagas...<n>Books can
whisk you away to all<n>kinds of worlds...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You can become a pretty princess or<n>a brave
hero. A book is like a portal to<n>a world of dreams!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Some books are challenging,but... there are so many wonderful andexciting ones out there too. I'm sure ifpeople just knew that...
choice_data_list: Why don't you use the event to teach them?
Why don't you use the event to teach them?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yes! If we can use this event to show<n>how
fascinating and charming books<n>can be, people
will feel less<n>intimidated!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Say no more!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You're welcome in advance! ♪<n>Genius Magical
Girl Sweepy is here to<n>help!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
If we team up and introduce everyone<n>to some
magical tales, I bet we can<n>open their eyes to the
wonders of<n>magic!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: R-really? Then, I'd love your help!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Very well, it's a deal! And if this<n>succeeds, I'll be
expecting you to join<n>me for some magic
practice! ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Okay! If it means more people learn to<n>appreciate
reading, then I'll join you<n>for any kind of practice
you like!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Besides... I've been wanting to<n>express my
gratitude for all your help<n>at the library too.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I only help because you're so clumsyI can't bear to just stand back andwatch! I have to step in!
choice_data_list: I'll help out any way I can too!
I'll help out any way I can too!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much, both of you!
